mapper.update: UPDATE iot_alarm_eval_state SET org_id = #{orgId}, device_group_key = #{deviceGroupKey}, condition_met_since = #{conditionMetSince}, last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt}, create_user = #{createUser}, update_user = #{updateUser}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_alarm_eval_state SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
